jobDescription: Who we are At Justworks, you’ll enjoy a welcoming and casual environment, great benefits, wellness program offerings, company retreats, and the ability to interact with and learn from leaders in the startup community. We work hard and care about our most prized asset - our people. We’re helping businesses get off the ground by enabling them to focus on running their business. We solve HR issues. We’re data driven and never stop iterating. If you’d like to work in a supportive, entrepreneurial environment, are interested in building something meaningful and having fun while doing it, we’d love to hear from you. The job Justworks is seeking a Technical Program Manager on one of our core product areas to work collaboratively with the Product Manager and business stakeholders. Technical Program Managers are responsible for driving large, company-wide initiatives from start to finish, building consensus and confidence along the way. What you'll do Define the vision and strategy for initiatives alongside business stakeholders and your direct working teams Gather requirements from stakeholders as well as using available data - including Voice of Customer data, external market data, etc. Lead regular check-ins with project working groups and help keep critical deliverables on track Create detailed project timelines and make adjustments as needed, setting clear expectations for the working group Lead change, anticipate how other teams might be impacted and facilitate scoping and process design with them Identify, communicate, and mitigate potential risks to the success of projects you lead Liaise with partners and vendors outside of the organization to drive execution of projects with external dependencies Do what it takes to get the job done and motivate a team Be able to say “ No,” but back it up with reasoning Maintain a positive attitude, even in the face of adversity Lead resolution efforts for issues that may arise and follow through until they’re completed Empower non-technical stakeholders by distilling technical concepts into easy-to-understand explanations Help document requirements and troubleshoot issues alongside the product manager and engineers Who you are1-2 years of program or project management or product support experience, with demonstrated wins SQL knowledge Experience with software planning tools and/or project management tools Able to learn about the Justworks payroll/tax program and other domains quickly Strong communication skills Creative problem-solver with a passion for making complex things simple(r) Team player who puts the needs of the project and group first Bonus points You have a technical degree (in Computer Science or related field) You have an understanding of Saa S SMB products You have experience in the HR and/or payroll space, generally
